title: matricaria microcephala
intro: Matricaria microcephala, also known as small-flowered chamomile, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help soothe skin irritations and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Matricaria microcephala include its ability to calm the digestive system, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote relaxation, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for insomnia and restlessness. Herbal preparations of Matricaria microcephala can be made into teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, from skin conditions to gastrointestinal problems.
